headline: Gift Article
body: In today’s DealSheet, Liverpool consider next move over Diomande after €100m package rejected, possible alternatives if deal can’t be agreed, and plenty of loan interest in LFC youngsters, with Ndukwe likely to get temporary move. With greggevans40 nytimes.com/athletic/7382334… Link The Transfer DealSheet: Latest on Man Utd, Arsenal, Liverpool, Real Madrid and more (Gift Article) This is the latest across the game's biggest clubs in the 2026 summer transfer window nytimes.com
raw_text:
In today’s DealSheet, Liverpool consider next move over Diomande after €100m package rejected, possible alternatives if deal can’t be agreed, and plenty of loan interest in LFC youngsters, with Ndukwe likely to get temporary move. 

With @greggevans40
